_meta.artifact_type: PRE-QA ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA (forward-looking gate spec, not a verdict on existing rows)
_meta.author: QA / validation-gate session (independent adversarial, REVIEW-ONLY)
_meta.role: independent adversarial QA / consolidation gate; REVIEW-ONLY; no DB writes; no --allow-db-write; no mutation of the manifest, ready file, LEDGER, PROGRESS, ownership_tier, entity_classification, ownership_status, or any prior QA file
_meta.scope: Chicagoland / IL only. Boston/MA PARKED — any MA row in any Wave 4 output is out-of-scope noise and auto-fails the IL-scope check.
_meta.purpose: Define the acceptance bar Gate Owner enforces BEFORE merging any Wave 4 output (Main AO or Fleet B) into the candidate manifest's ready_to_validate bucket. A Wave 4 row is merge-eligible ONLY if it passes EVERY applicable gate below. Default disposition for any row that fails or is ambiguous is needs_more_evidence / undetermined — never ready, never true_independent.
_meta.predecessor_verdict: ownership_manifest_QA_wave3_reqa5_20260621.json (RE-QA #5: PASS — no outstanding MUST-FIX, ready=310, FROZEN)
_meta.non_mutation_attestation: Producing this file performed ZERO writes to the manifest, ready file, LEDGER, PROGRESS, ownership_tier, entity_classification, ownership_status, the DB, or any prior QA file. New file only.

tier_model_locked.T1_true_independent: One dentist, ONE location. EARNED with positive evidence — NEVER defaulted.
tier_model_locked.T4_stealth_dso: Local / friendly-PC brand backed or managed by a DSO/MSO/PE platform.
tier_model_locked.T5_branded_dso: DSO/platform/management-co STRUCTURE, OR an established DSO brand (even if family-owned / non-PE).
tier_model_locked.undetermined: Ambiguous — held for verification. Default for any row failing a gate.
tier_model_locked.pe_backed: ORTHOGONAL boolean. Set ONLY from documented MSO/PE evidence. Never sets or downgrades a tier by itself.

input_1_conflict_rows_by_network.note: These are HELD because passes disagreed on tier (DSO vs dentist_multi) for the same network. Wave 4 must adjudicate WHOLE-NETWORK, not row-by-row. Webster set (17 rows total across the two Webster labels) stays held unless whole-network adjudication resolves it.

input_2_evidence_gap_backfill_queue.note: These were DEMOTED out of ready in prior waves for a named missing_evidence_type. A backfill row is re-promotable to ready ONLY when the SPECIFIC missing_evidence_type named in its row is satisfied by a real, on-disk, source-backed artifact. The 13 locator_exact rows were demoted precisely because the fleet asserted web_verified+exact_address_match but the URL string was NOT transcribed to any on-disk file — that exact failure mode is the acceptance test for this lane.

input_3_fleet_b_phase_c_batch.all_leads_assigned_tier: undetermined (confidence low=692 / medium=2 across the nv set)
input_3_fleet_b_phase_c_batch.reconciliation_flag: Of the 694 needs_verification leads, only 115 currently carry ANY evidence_urls/brands/EIN artifact in the manifest sidecar (74 evidence_urls, 52 brands, 4 EIN-basis; union 115). The asserted 158 'hard-signal' subset MUST be defined by a TRANSCRIBED on-disk artifact per row. QA will reject any lead claimed 'hard-signal' whose corroborating artifact (URL string / EIN value / brand-locator entry naming the exact address) is not actually present on disk — same defect as the 13 locator_exact backfill rows.

global_hard_rules_in_force: Chicagoland/IL only. Any MA row auto-fails.
No DB writes. No --allow-db-write. No mutation of manifest/ready/LEDGER/PROGRESS/ownership_tier/entity_classification/ownership_status/prior-QA files.

No-anchor math: consolidation % is computed FROM the census ledger with coverage — never anchored to ADA 14.6%, '30% metro', or the legacy 5% entity_classification floor (that floor is a different axis; leave it alone).
Treat all final_ready / final_* agent outputs as ready_for_validation, NOT final truth.
consolidate_census.py --allow-db-write is NOT authorized until the user explicitly says 'consolidate approved manifest'.
Protected networks (do-not-release without explicit main-session release): SHAFI, BELKIC, NITTINGER, AQEL, BRUNETTI, SWEIS, LABINOV, RAMAHA.

acceptance_bar.rule: AO (authorized-official) co-occurrence reach is a DISCOVERY SIGNAL, never proof of ownership.
acceptance_bar.merge_test: Every promoted row must carry a durable artifact BEYOND shared AO reach: a shared real EIN cluster, a documented DSO/MSO/PE parent or legal entity, a verifiable per-location locator/website URL, OR the row's own db_affiliated_dso / db_parent_company. Reach co-occurrence alone => NOT eligible.
acceptance_bar.fail_action: Hold in needs_more_evidence with backfill_lane='AO_network' (or 'reach_only_no_durable_artifact'); record the missing artifact type.

acceptance_bar.rule: A brand token appearing in (or attached to) a local practice name is NOT proof of affiliation.
acceptance_bar.merge_test: branded_dso/stealth_dso promotion requires the DSO's OWN locator (or an equivalent documentary source) to list THIS EXACT normalized street address + ZIP — not a name-substring or a brand mention. Reuse the Fleet B brand-attach QA flag pattern: 'local name does not contain brand token => QA confirm the brand locator truly lists THIS exact address.'
acceptance_bar.fail_action: Hold in needs_more_evidence; backfill_lane='locator_exact'; require the transcribed exact-address locator URL before re-promotion.

acceptance_bar.rule: Every promoted row needs durable documentary corroboration that is REAL and ON-DISK.
durable_evidence_whitelist: shared real EIN across 3+ locations (EIN value present, not asserted)
documented DSO/MSO/management-company/PE parent or legal entity (named, with source)
verifiable per-location locator/website URL listing the exact address (URL string transcribed to an evidence file)
the row's own db_affiliated_dso / db_parent_company / org-taxonomy DB artifact
a practice_intel dossier with a recorded source URL (for practice_intel lane)
not_durable: an asserted 'web_verified' / 'exact_address_match' with NO transcribed URL on disk
a fleet confidence label with no underlying artifact
acceptance_bar.merge_test: Open the cited artifact on disk and confirm it exists and names the address. If the artifact is only described but not transcribed, the row FAILS.
acceptance_bar.fail_action: Hold in needs_more_evidence; name the exact missing_evidence_type.

acceptance_bar.rule: DSO tier (T4 stealth_dso / T5 branded_dso) requires STRUCTURE: a DSO / MSO / management-company / platform, or an established DSO brand.
acceptance_bar.merge_test: branded_dso/stealth_dso promotion must cite the structural entity (management co / MSO / platform / established brand). A multi-location dentist-owned group with NO separate management entity is T3 dentist_multi, NOT a DSO tier. Apply DSO=STRUCTURE uniformly (precedent: SHAFI_REEM ~20-office single-owner trade-name network adjudicated dentist_multi on this rule).
acceptance_bar.fail_action: Reclassify to dentist_multi (T3) or hold undetermined; record DSO=STRUCTURE rationale.

acceptance_bar.rule: pe_backed is an orthogonal boolean set ONLY from documented MSO/PE evidence.
acceptance_bar.merge_test: pe_backed=true must cite the PE/MSO document. pe_backed=false must NEVER be the REASON a branded_dso is downgraded to dentist_multi — any such downgrade requires an independent STRUCTURE rationale (see AB4).
acceptance_bar.fail_action: Reject the row's tier change if its only justification is pe_backed status; require a structure-based rationale.

acceptance_bar.rule: T1 true_independent is EARNED with positive evidence, never defaulted from absence of DSO signal.
acceptance_bar.merge_test: A true_independent promotion must show positive owner-operated evidence (e.g., practice site naming the owner-dentist, single-location confirmation). Ambiguous => undetermined. Additionally screen for closed/deceased-owner rows (Fleet B already flagged Marinucci/Krafcisin deceased-owner rows) — these are excluded from the GP denominator, NOT counted true_independent.
acceptance_bar.fail_action: Hold as undetermined; if closed/deceased-owner, route to operating-status exclusion (NOT true_independent).

acceptance_bar.rule: The validator CANNOT see operating status — QA must scan every new ready row for self-flagged closure/relocation of its OWN counted door.
acceptance_bar.merge_test: Scan each promoted row's reasoning/evidence for 'closed', 'Yelp shows closed', 'relocated', 'stale shell', 'now at this address', 'defunct', 'deceased'. SEPARATE subject-door closure (DEMOTE) from a sibling/legacy-location note (may stay). Adjudicate every closure mention explicitly.
acceptance_bar.fail_action: Demote subject-door closures to needs_more_evidence with preserved_ready_row=true + backfill_lane='operating_status_unverified'.

acceptance_bar.rule: location_id dedup does NOT catch same-physical-door duplicates carrying conflicting tiers.
acceptance_bar.merge_test: For every new promoted row: (a) is its location_id also a duplicate_denominator_blocked id? (b) does it share a normalized address OR phone with another live-bucket row carrying a DIFFERENT tier? Either => same-door tier conflict (precedent: ff41419130267bd9 / f94fb29cc7d444cd same-phone leak).
acceptance_bar.fail_action: Demote to needs_more_evidence, backfill_lane='duplicate_door_tier_conflict'; keep duplicate_denominator_blocked.currently_in_candidate_set current; reconcile the door to ONE canonical row + ONE tier before re-promotion.

acceptance_bar.rule: Any ready row whose network/surname is protected (SHAFI, BELKIC, NITTINGER, AQEL, BRUNETTI, SWEIS, LABINOV, RAMAHA) requires an EXPLICIT release.
acceptance_bar.merge_test: Every protected-network row in any Wave 4 ready promotion must have an explicit entry in ao_network_release_decisions.decisions (or reach4/reach3 equivalent) with network_evidence_quality='verified' AND decision='release_eligible', OR a documented 'covered_by_prior_release'. Reaching ready through a generic per-row gate is NOT a release.
acceptance_bar.fail_action: Pull the row from ready; hold until an explicit, verified release decision exists. (Backfill queue currently carries 17 protected_network_hold rows — none may surface in ready without this.)

acceptance_bar.rule: The Webster Dental contested set stays HELD in conflicts.
acceptance_bar.merge_test: No Webster row (Cicero/Evanston/Schaumburg/North Suburban + Berwyn Family Dental, Klyber Dental, Brite/Aqel, and both 'Webster Dental' / 'Webster Dental Care (contested)' gate_network labels — 17 conflict rows) may move to ready without a documented MAIN-SESSION whole-network adjudication artifact. Row-by-row promotion is forbidden for this set.
acceptance_bar.fail_action: Keep in conflicts; reject any partial/per-row Webster promotion.

acceptance_bar.rule: Sidecar / network intelligence must be PRESERVED, never flattened on merge.
acceptance_bar.merge_test: After any Wave 4 merge, confirm baseline sidecars are intact and only grow: ao wave1=6, wave2_reach4=14, wave3_reach3=51, individuals=13; fleet_b_wave3=720 (local 637 / website 79 / structural 4); ao_network_intelligence, ao_network_release_decisions, reach4/reach3 release decisions, fleet_b_*_dispositions, qa_mustfix_actions, landmine_blocklist, qa_flags all present.
acceptance_bar.fail_action: Block the merge if any sidecar count drops or a release/disposition/intelligence block is dropped or overwritten.

acceptance_bar.rule: Fleet B needs_verification rows remain LEADS unless Phase-C produces real, source-backed evidence.
acceptance_bar.merge_test: All 694 needs_verification leads are assigned_tier=undetermined and are sidecar-only by default. A lead becomes ready-eligible ONLY after Phase-C web verification yields a transcribed durable artifact (AB1-AB3) AND it clears AB4-AB8. The asserted 158 'hard-signal' subset is the recommended Phase-C starting pool, NOT a promotion list — each of the 158 still passes the full bar individually. da_synthetic_npi / DA_-prefixed rows are never promotable (route to rejected/backfill).
acceptance_bar.fail_action: Leave in fleet_b_wave3 sidecar as needs_verification; Phase-C output that lacks a transcribed source URL fails.

per_input_merge_gates.conflicts_74: Resolve WHOLE-NETWORK only. Produce, per network, one adjudicated tier with a STRUCTURE-based rationale (AB4) and durable evidence (AB3). 1st Family Dental (23) and Brite/Aqel (12) carry protected/contested overlap — Aqel is a protected surname (AB9) and Brite/Aqel overlaps Webster (AB10). A network is mergeable only when ALL its conflict rows resolve to ONE consistent tier with evidence; otherwise the whole network stays in conflicts.
per_input_merge_gates.backfill_87: Each row is re-promotable ONLY when the SPECIFIC missing_evidence_type named in that row is satisfied by a real on-disk artifact. The 40 null-lane rows still need a named evidence type before promotion. The 17 protected_network_hold rows additionally require AB9. The 13 locator_exact rows require the transcribed exact-address URL (the reason they were demoted).
per_input_merge_gates.fleet_b_phase_c: Start from the 158 hard-signal subset but reconcile it first: confirm each 'hard-signal' lead's artifact is transcribed on disk (only 115/694 currently carry any URL/brand/EIN field in the sidecar). A Phase-C verification is acceptable ONLY if it (a) records the actual search/source URL, (b) names the exact address, (c) yields a durable artifact per AB3, and (d) the resulting tier clears AB4-AB8. Bounded batch: cap and LOG the batch size; never silently truncate; do not run census_batches_remaining as a mass classification wave.

output_contract_for_main_ao_and_fleet_b.must_deliver_files_only: Wave 4 outputs are FILES-ONLY evidence. No DB writes, no ownership_tier mutation, no manifest mutation by the producing agents — they emit new evidence/queue files that the Gate Owner merges.
required_per_promoted_row: proposed tier (T1-T6) with explicit DSO=STRUCTURE rationale where T4/T5
pe_backed boolean WITH cited document if true
durable_evidence artifact: the actual EIN value / parent entity name / transcribed locator URL / db field — not a description
evidence_source path or URL that exists on disk / is fetchable
same-door check result (no conflicting-tier twin by address/phone)
regate field convention honored: reach3 => candidate_tier/gate_status are the corrected values; reach4 => final_tier/final_gate
qa_will_reject_outputs_that: assert web_verified / exact_address_match without a transcribed URL
promote on AO reach or brand substring alone
move a protected-network or Webster row to ready without explicit/whole-network adjudication
flatten or drop any sidecar / release-decision / intelligence block
treat final_* labels as truth rather than ready_for_validation

enforceable_gate_owner_checklist: 1. Re-read the canonical manifest fresh as source of truth (do not trust agent summaries).
2. Bucket partition: ready / needs_more_evidence / conflicts / rejected mutually exclusive => 0 collisions; distinct-location total reconciles; record new counts vs baseline (ready 310 pre-Wave4).
3. Validator-native file parity: newest _ready_to_validate_*_fixed file count AND id-set == manifest.buckets.ready_to_validate (0 drift). Identify and ignore stale ready files.
4. AB7 closed/stale SUBJECT-DOOR scan on every NEW ready row (separate subject-door closure -> demote, from sibling notes -> may keep).
5. AB8 duplicate_denominator_blocked / same-address / same-phone conflicting-tier scan on every new ready row.
6. AB9 protected-network release audit: every protected-surname ready row has an explicit verified release or documented prior-coverage entry.
7. AB10 Webster contested set: 0 Webster rows promoted without a whole-network main-session adjudication artifact.
8. AB1/AB2/AB3 durable-evidence-beyond-reach + no-brand-substring check on EVERY new promotion; open and confirm each cited artifact exists on disk.
9. AB4 DSO=STRUCTURE + AB5 pe_backed-orthogonal: no T4/T5 without a structural entity; no pe_backed=false-driven downgrade.
10. AB6 true_independent earned (positive evidence) + closed/deceased-owner exclusion from denominator.
11. AB12 Fleet B discipline: only durable-artifact-backed Phase-C rows promoted; needs_verification stays sidecar; da_synthetic never promoted; 158 hard-signal reconciled to transcribed artifacts.
12. AB11 sidecars/intelligence preserved (counts only grow): ao 6/14/51 + individuals 13; fleet_b 720; all release-decision + disposition + qa_mustfix + landmine blocks intact.

13. Run consolidate_census.py --validate-only on the newest fixed ready file with a BEFORE/AFTER DB md5 + LEDGER line-count + PROGRESS snapshot to PROVE zero writes (baseline db.md5 0dec26135bb4d6ee490dc16cfe892ca6; LEDGER 1 line; PROGRESS undetermined_unreviewed 4439).

14. Write a fresh ownership_manifest_QA_*_20260621.json verdict with exact MUST-FIX location_ids if any; state gate authorization (NOT authorized until the user's explicit 'consolidate approved manifest').
merge_eligibility_decision_rule: A Wave 4 row is merge-eligible into ready_to_validate IF AND ONLY IF it passes ALL of: AB1, AB2, AB3 (durable on-disk artifact), AB4 (structure for any DSO tier), AB5 (pe_backed orthogonal), AB6 (independent earned), AB7 (subject door open), AB8 (no same-door tier conflict), AB9 (explicit release if protected), AB10 (not a held Webster row), AB12 (Fleet B durable-artifact rule). ANY single failure => default to needs_more_evidence (with named backfill_lane) or undetermined. There is no partial credit and no 'promote pending later evidence'.

consolidate_authorization.gate_state: FROZEN. These are PRE-merge acceptance criteria; no Wave 4 output has been reviewed or merged yet, and consolidation remains frozen at the RE-QA #5 310-row baseline.
consolidate_authorization.reason: consolidate_census.py --allow-db-write runs ONLY when the user explicitly says 'consolidate approved manifest'. No Wave 4 output may be merged to ready until it passes the acceptance_bar above and a fresh QA verdict records PASS.
